story.soThat: API endpoint'lerini gerçek database ile test edebilleyim
story.tasks: - Task 1: Test Database Setup - test/setup.ts Oluştur (AC: 9.3.1, 9.3.2) - Task 2: Integration Test Infrastructure - Users Controller Test Dosyası (AC: 9.3.3) - Task 3: GET /users Integration Tests (AC: 9.3.4, 9.3.8) - Task 4: POST /users Integration Tests (AC: 9.3.5, 9.3.8) - Task 5: PATCH /users/:id Integration Tests (AC: 9.3.6, 9.3.8) - Task 6: DELETE /users/:id Integration Tests (AC: 9.3.7, 9.3.8) - Task 7: Performance Validation (AC: 9.3.9) - Task 8: Documentation and README Update (AC: 9.3.3)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
### AC-9.3.1: Test Database Configuration and Setup - Separate test database (`boilerplate_test`) configured - DATABASE_URL override ile test database'e bağlanılıyor - `beforeAll` hook'unda database connection kurulmuş - `afterAll` hook'unda database connection kapatılmış - Test environment için Prisma client instance oluşturulmuş
### AC-9.3.2: Table Cleanup Between Tests - `beforeEach` hook'unda test database tables temizleniyor (user, permission, role, vb.) - Truncate veya deleteMany stratejisi ile hızlı cleanup - Foreign key constraints göz önünde bulundurularak doğru sırada cleanup - Seed data minimal tutulmuş (test-specific data)
### AC-9.3.3: Integration Test Example - Users Controller - TestingModule ile full application context oluşturulmuş - Real database queries execute ediliyor (mock yok) - HTTP request/response validation yapılıyor - Test pattern: Setup → Seed → Execute → Verify DB State → Cleanup
### AC-9.3.4: GET /users Endpoint Integration Test - Test case: "should return paginated users list" - Test case: "should return empty list when no users" - Test case: "should filter soft-deleted users"
### AC-9.3.5: POST /users Endpoint Integration Test - Test case: "should create user successfully" - Test case: "should return 409 when email exists" - Test case: "should validate DTO fields"
### AC-9.3.6: PATCH /users/:id Endpoint Integration Test - Test case: "should update user successfully" - Test case: "should return 404 when user not found" - Test case: "should return 409 when updating to existing phoneNumber"
### AC-9.3.7: DELETE /users/:id Endpoint Integration Test - Test case: "should soft-delete user successfully" - Test case: "should return 404 when user not found for delete" - Test case: "should not hard-delete user"
### AC-9.3.8: Database State Verification - PrismaService kullanarak database'den user query edilebilmeli - Created/Updated/Deleted users database'de verify edilebilmeli - Relations (user → permissions, user → roles) doğru load edilmiş - Test data isolation sağlanmış (test'ler birbirini etkilemiyor)
### AC-9.3.9: Performance and Execution Time - Her integration test < 5 saniye execute edilmeli - Database cleanup overhead minimal (< 100ms per test) - Full integration test suite < 30 saniye tamamlanmalı - Parallel execution desteklenmeli (test isolation sayesinde)

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Testing Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Integration test workflow: Setup (beforeAll) → Prepare (beforeEach with cleanup) → Execute (real HTTP/DB) → Verify (response + DB state) → Cleanup (afterEach) → Teardown (afterAll). Use TestingModule with full AppModule, real PrismaService, separate test database.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Testing Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Separate test database (boilerplate_test), same schema as production via Prisma migrations. Clean state between tests via truncate/deleteMany. Seed minimal data per test scenario.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Testing Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Setup: Connect to test DB, bootstrap NestJS. Prepare: Truncate tables, seed test data. Execute: Send HTTP or call service. Verify: Assert response AND database state. Cleanup: Truncate tables. Teardown: Close connections and app.

doc.title: Epic 9: Testing Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Integration test setup for API endpoint testing with real database. Includes test DB config, table cleanup, Users controller integration test examples covering GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE endpoints with database state verification.

doc.title: Story 9.1: Jest Configuration & Test Setup
doc.snippet: Jest v30 configured with ts-jest, coverage thresholds (70% global, 80% services, 100% common), module path aliases working, test scripts functional (test, test:watch, test:cov, test:e2e).

doc.title: Story 9.2: Unit Test Examples
doc.snippet: Unit test pattern established: AAA (Arrange-Act-Assert), TestingModule for DI, mock all dependencies. Key difference: Unit tests mock everything, integration tests use real database and services.

artifact.reason: Controller under test - contains GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE endpoints for users that need integration testing
Service layer to be invoked through real HTTP requests in integration tests (not mocked)
Reference for unit test patterns with AAA structure and mocking - DO NOT replicate mocking in integration tests
DTO for POST /users endpoint testing - use for valid/invalid request payloads
DTO for PATCH /users/:id endpoint testing - use for update request payloads
DTO for GET /users query parameters (pagination, filtering)
Real PrismaService instance to be used for database cleanup and verification in integration tests
Jest test configuration with coverage thresholds, path aliases, and test patterns
NestJS module definition - helps understand dependencies for full app context

node.package: NestJS testing utilities - TestingModule, Test class for integration test setup
Test framework for running integration tests
HTTP assertion library for testing NestJS endpoints
NestJS core - provides exception classes (NotFoundException, ConflictException)
NestJS core framework for bootstrapping test app
Express adapter for NestJS (required for HTTP testing)
Prisma client for real database operations in integration tests
Prisma CLI for database migrations and schema management

story-context.constraints: - Use separate test database (boilerplate_test), never use production database - NO MOCKING in integration tests - use real PrismaService, real database, real HTTP requests - Follow integration test pattern: Setup (beforeAll) → Prepare (beforeEach cleanup) → Execute → Verify DB State → Cleanup (afterEach) → Teardown (afterAll) - Test file naming: *.integration.spec.ts (e.g., users.controller.integration.spec.ts) - Test files in src/modules/[module]/__tests__/ directory - Use TestingModule with full AppModule import (not mocked modules) - Database cleanup in correct foreign key order: dependent tables first (userPermissions → permissions → users → domains) - Each test must verify both HTTP response AND database state - Performance requirement: < 5 seconds per test, < 30 seconds full suite - Database cleanup overhead: < 100ms per test - Test isolation: Tests must run independently and in parallel - Seed minimal data per test (only what's needed for that specific test) - Use AAA pattern from unit tests (Arrange-Act-Assert) but with real dependencies - Integration tests complement unit tests (unit = mocked, integration = real)

interface.name: POST /users
interface.signature: POST /users - Body: CreateUserDto (email, password, firstName, lastName, phone, etc.)

interface.name: PATCH /users/:id
interface.signature: PATCH /users/:id - Params: id (UUID), Body: UpdateUserDto (partial user fields)

interface.name: DELETE /users/:id
interface.signature: DELETE /users/:id - Params: id (UUID) - Soft delete (sets deletedAt)

interface.name: setupTestDatabase helper
interface.signature: async function setupTestDatabase(prisma: PrismaService): Promise<void> - Cleans all tables in correct foreign key order

tests.standards: Jest v30 with ts-jest for TypeScript support. Integration test pattern: TestingModule with full AppModule, real PrismaService (no mocks), supertest for HTTP assertions. AAA pattern (Arrange-Act-Assert). Test database (boilerplate_test) cleaned before each test. Verify both HTTP response AND database state. File naming: *.integration.spec.ts in src/modules/[module]/__tests__/ directory.
tests.locations: - src/modules/users/__tests__/users.controller.integration.spec.ts (TO CREATE) - test/setup.ts (TO CREATE - database cleanup helper) - src/modules/*/controllers/*.integration.spec.ts (pattern for future integration tests)
tests.ideas: - AC-9.3.1: Create test database setup helper in test/setup.ts - exports setupTestDatabase(prisma) function - AC-9.3.2: setupTestDatabase cleans tables in correct FK order: userPermissions, notificationPreferences, permissions, users, domains - AC-9.3.3: Create users.controller.integration.spec.ts with full app bootstrap (TestingModule + AppModule) - AC-9.3.4: Test GET /users - paginated list (seed 5 users), empty list, soft-delete filtering - AC-9.3.5: Test POST /users - successful creation with DB verification, conflict on duplicate email, validation errors - AC-9.3.6: Test PATCH /users/:id - successful update with DB verification, 404 not found, conflict on duplicate phoneNumber - AC-9.3.7: Test DELETE /users/:id - soft delete with DB verification (deletedAt set), 404 not found, verify no hard delete - AC-9.3.8: Every test verifies database state using prisma.user.findUnique/findMany after HTTP request - AC-9.3.9: Measure and verify test execution time (< 5s per test, < 30s suite), optimize cleanup if needed
